rulings.Case Title: ANA ORTEGA VS. DIONISIO ESPINOZA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,317 Against Defendants Dionisio Espinoza, Natalia Espinoza Monica Espinoza And Their Counsel Of Record Thomas Gelini
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 8, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF ANA ORTEGA and JUAN HERNANDEZ's Motion For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,317 Against Defendants Dionisio Espinoza, Natalia Espinoza Monica Espinoza And Their Counsel Of Record Thomas Gelini GRANTED. Defendants failed to appear for a mandatory settlement conference in violation of CRC 3.1380(b) and SLFR 5.0(D) without being excused from attendance by the Court. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their filings in future.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Judgment; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 8, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT HERBERT SANTOS-EK's Motion To Vacate Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b).= (501/REQ)
